name: Cheese Toasties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, beat together the eggs and mayonnaise.
2. On a flat plate, mix together all the remaining ingredients (except for the bread).
3. Trim the crusts from the bread and slice each piece into three strips.
4. Grease a large baking sheet.
5. Dip each piece of bread in the egg mixture, then drain off excess. Thoroughly coat each piece with the cheese mixture, but not heavily.
6. Place the coated bread on the prepared baking sheet. It can be refrigerated for up to 6 hours at this point.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown. Let cool on the sheet for one minute before removing to a serving platter.
